block_00: Card pratiyaan ko asvikrit kar diya gaya
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi card pratiyon ko asvikaar kar diya gaya kyonki card ke pichhe hastaakshar nahin hai. Kripya neeche diye gaye link ke maadhyam se naye card chhaviyaan upload karen.
block_03: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki saraahana karte hain.
block_06: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
